calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-24-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-24-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Cindy Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority.
Plaintiff's Witness: Bridget Colbert, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Otila Uiagalelei sued as Otila Uiagalelee aka Otilla Uiagalelei.
Plaintiff request to amend the Defendant's name to: Otila Uiagalelei aka Otilla Uiagalelei, granted in open court.
Exhibit 1- Lease Agreement------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Forteen-Day Notice---------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3- Declaration of Service-----------------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2484 Griffith St., San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Past-due Rent $1,087.00
Holdover Damages $2,920.32
Costs $200.00, for a Total of $4,207.32
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Comm. Sue Kaplan Dept.: 218 Clerk: Anna Redigonda

Matter comes on calendar for Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Cindy Lee appearing for Plaintiff.

Settlement Conference is ordered off calendar. No appearance by Defendant. Trial Date remains.
(not reported)
